---
name: Skill / artifact suggestion
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, prompt, or workflow this repo should add
title: "[suggestion] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What kind of artifact?

- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Agent (subagent)
- [ ] Prompt fragment
- [ ] Workflow template
- [ ] Not sure

## What problem does it solve?

<Short description of the workflow or pain point the new artifact would address. Who would use it and when?>

## Trigger phrases / when it'd fire

<What would a user say to invoke this? e.g. `/<name>`, "make a foo", "review with Codex". The more concrete the trigger phrases, the easier this is to evaluate.>

## Have you seen something similar?

<Link to existing skills here, plugin marketplaces, or other repos that came close — and what's missing from those.>

## Sketch (optional)

<A rough outline of what the SKILL.md body would say, if you have one. Not required — naming the gap is enough.>

## Anything else?

<Constraints, edge cases, related skills, etc.>
